response.justification: Strong engineer with 19 years of experience and appropriate seniority (Staff level), but lacks the core qualification for this role: demonstrated AI expertise and thought leadership. While the candidate is currently working on AI infrastructure at re:cinq (as of April 2025), this represents only one month of focused AI work against a career primarily in infrastructure, web, and mobile systems. The role requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms'—the preferred Master's/PhD in AI is also absent. Could potentially grow into the strategic AI advisory responsibilities, but is not yet positioned as the specialized AI strategy leader this role requires.
strengths: Meets 15+ year requirement with 19 years in software engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, robotics)
Staff-level seniority with proven technical leadership through open-source projects (GISCollective), workshops, and talks
Broad technical depth across multiple languages and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes) demonstrating adaptability
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI expertise prior to April 2025 current role; AI work is too recent to establish credibility on 'recognized expertise in AI'
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field, contrary to stated preferred qualifications for this director-level strategy role
No evident experience in strategic customer or partner advising on emerging technologies—critical for advising strategic customers on 'cutting-edge cloud and AI technologies'

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure work vs. required AI strategy expertise
No advanced degree in AI-related field (preferred qualification)
